name: notify-on-stop
description: Desktop notification when Claude finishes a task
author: sieteunoseis

hooks.name: macOS notification on stop
hooks.description: Sends a macOS notification via osascript when Claude stops

hook.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Task complete" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true

hooks.name: cmux notification on stop
hooks.description: Sends a cmux notification when Claude stops (requires cmux terminal)
